Program.doc: represents a CLVM program node, which is either an atom (leaf) or a cons pair (branch) in the Chialisp expression tree.

compile.doc: compiles and runs the program as Chialisp, returning the output and cost.

unparse.doc: converts the CLVM program back into a human-readable Chialisp string.

serialize.doc: serializes the program into the standard CLVM binary format.

serialize_with_backrefs.doc: serializes the program using CLVM backref compression (CHIP-0002) for smaller output.

run.doc: executes this program as a puzzle with the given solution, enforcing the cost limit and optional mempool rules.

curry.doc: curries arguments into this program, binding them as fixed parameters (standard Chialisp currying).

uncurry.doc: attempts to uncurry the program, extracting the base module and its curried arguments.

tree_hash.doc: computes the SHA-256 tree hash of the program, which uniquely identifies its structure.

is_atom.doc: reports whether the program is an atom (leaf node) rather than a cons pair.

is_pair.doc: reports whether the program is a cons pair rather than an atom.

is_null.doc: reports whether the program is nil (the empty atom, representing false or an empty list).

length.doc: returns the length of the program when interpreted as a proper CLVM list.

first.doc: returns the first element (car) of a cons pair. Fails if the program is an atom.

rest.doc: returns the rest element (cdr) of a cons pair. Fails if the program is an atom.

to_int.doc: interprets the atom as a signed big integer, or nil if this is a pair.

to_bound_checked_number.doc: interprets the atom as a bounds-checked floating-point number, or nil if invalid.

to_string.doc: interprets the atom as a UTF-8 string, or nil if this is a pair or not valid UTF-8.

to_bool.doc: interprets the program as a boolean (nil is false, anything else is true), or nil if ambiguous.

to_atom.doc: returns the raw bytes of the atom, or nil if this is a pair.

to_list.doc: interprets the program as a proper CLVM list, or nil if it is not nil-terminated.

to_arg_list.doc: extracts a curried argument list from the program, or nil if the structure does not match.

to_pair.doc: returns the first and rest of a cons pair, or nil if this is an atom.

puzzle.doc: identifies the puzzle type (standard, CAT, NFT, DID, etc.) by analyzing the program structure.

parse_nft_metadata.doc: attempts to parse the program as NFT metadata (data URIs, metadata URIs, license URIs, etc.).

parse_remark.doc: attempts to parse the program as a REMARK condition.

parse_agg_sig_parent.doc: attempts to parse the program as an AGG_SIG_PARENT condition.

parse_agg_sig_puzzle.doc: attempts to parse the program as an AGG_SIG_PUZZLE condition.

parse_agg_sig_amount.doc: attempts to parse the program as an AGG_SIG_AMOUNT condition.

parse_agg_sig_puzzle_amount.doc: attempts to parse the program as an AGG_SIG_PUZZLE_AMOUNT condition.

parse_agg_sig_parent_amount.doc: attempts to parse the program as an AGG_SIG_PARENT_AMOUNT condition.

parse_agg_sig_parent_puzzle.doc: attempts to parse the program as an AGG_SIG_PARENT_PUZZLE condition.

parse_agg_sig_unsafe.doc: attempts to parse the program as an AGG_SIG_UNSAFE condition.

parse_agg_sig_me.doc: attempts to parse the program as an AGG_SIG_ME condition.

parse_create_coin.doc: attempts to parse the program as a CREATE_COIN condition.

parse_reserve_fee.doc: attempts to parse the program as a RESERVE_FEE condition.

parse_create_coin_announcement.doc: attempts to parse the program as a CREATE_COIN_ANNOUNCEMENT condition.

parse_create_puzzle_announcement.doc: attempts to parse the program as a CREATE_PUZZLE_ANNOUNCEMENT condition.

parse_assert_coin_announcement.doc: attempts to parse the program as an ASSERT_COIN_ANNOUNCEMENT condition.

parse_assert_puzzle_announcement.doc: attempts to parse the program as an ASSERT_PUZZLE_ANNOUNCEMENT condition.

parse_assert_concurrent_spend.doc: attempts to parse the program as an ASSERT_CONCURRENT_SPEND condition.

parse_assert_concurrent_puzzle.doc: attempts to parse the program as an ASSERT_CONCURRENT_PUZZLE condition.

parse_assert_seconds_relative.doc: attempts to parse the program as an ASSERT_SECONDS_RELATIVE condition.

parse_assert_seconds_absolute.doc: attempts to parse the program as an ASSERT_SECONDS_ABSOLUTE condition.

parse_assert_height_relative.doc: attempts to parse the program as an ASSERT_HEIGHT_RELATIVE condition.

parse_assert_height_absolute.doc: attempts to parse the program as an ASSERT_HEIGHT_ABSOLUTE condition.

parse_assert_before_seconds_relative.doc: attempts to parse the program as an ASSERT_BEFORE_SECONDS_RELATIVE condition.

parse_assert_before_seconds_absolute.doc: attempts to parse the program as an ASSERT_BEFORE_SECONDS_ABSOLUTE condition.

parse_assert_before_height_relative.doc: attempts to parse the program as an ASSERT_BEFORE_HEIGHT_RELATIVE condition.

parse_assert_before_height_absolute.doc: attempts to parse the program as an ASSERT_BEFORE_HEIGHT_ABSOLUTE condition.

parse_assert_my_coin_id.doc: attempts to parse the program as an ASSERT_MY_COIN_ID condition.

parse_assert_my_parent_id.doc: attempts to parse the program as an ASSERT_MY_PARENT_ID condition.

parse_assert_my_puzzle_hash.doc: attempts to parse the program as an ASSERT_MY_PUZZLEHASH condition.

parse_assert_my_amount.doc: attempts to parse the program as an ASSERT_MY_AMOUNT condition.

parse_assert_my_birth_seconds.doc: attempts to parse the program as an ASSERT_MY_BIRTH_SECONDS condition.

parse_assert_my_birth_height.doc: attempts to parse the program as an ASSERT_MY_BIRTH_HEIGHT condition.

parse_assert_ephemeral.doc: attempts to parse the program as an ASSERT_EPHEMERAL condition.

parse_send_message.doc: attempts to parse the program as a SEND_MESSAGE condition (CHIP-0025).

parse_receive_message.doc: attempts to parse the program as a RECEIVE_MESSAGE condition (CHIP-0025).

parse_softfork.doc: attempts to parse the program as a SOFTFORK condition.

parse_melt_singleton.doc: attempts to parse the program as a melt singleton condition.

parse_transfer_nft.doc: attempts to parse the program as an NFT transfer condition with royalty info.

parse_run_cat_tail.doc: attempts to parse the program as a RUN_CAT_TAIL condition.

parse_update_nft_metadata.doc: attempts to parse the program as an NFT metadata update condition.

parse_update_data_store_merkle_root.doc: attempts to parse the program as a DataLayer merkle root update condition.

parse_option_metadata.doc: attempts to parse the program as option contract metadata.

parse_payment.doc: attempts to parse the program as a payment (puzzle hash, amount, memos).

parse_notarized_payment.doc: attempts to parse the program as a notarized payment used in offer settlements.

parse_reward_distributor_launcher_soluti.doc: attempts to parse the program as a reward distributor launcher solution, extracting configuration info.
